Tile Roof Restoration

Professional tile roof restoration — deep clean, repoint, reseal, and recoat. Restores waterproofing, lifts curb appeal, adds years to your roof's life.

Metal Roof Restoration

Testimonials

What our clients say

FAQs

Common questions

What is the difference between a roof restoration and a roof replacement?

A roof restoration involves cleaning, repairing, and recoating your existing roof structure, extending its life without removing the existing roof covering. A roof replacement strips the old roof entirely and installs new roofing material. Restoration is typically 40-60% cheaper and takes 2-4 days instead of 1-2 weeks.

How much does a roof restoration cost in Melbourne?

As a rough guide: a standard 3-bedroom home (200sqm) tile roof restoration ranges from $4,000 to $8,000. Metal roof restoration ranges from $3,000 to $6,000. We provide free, no-obligation quotes with a detailed breakdown.

How long does a typical roof restoration last?

A professionally done roof restoration should last 10-15+ years with proper maintenance. We use premium-grade coatings and back our work with a 10-year workmanship guarantee.

Is roof restoration worth it?

Absolutely. A roof restoration costs a fraction of a full replacement, adds 10-15 years to your roof's life, improves energy efficiency, increases property value, and enhances curb appeal. For most Melbourne homes with aging but structurally sound roofs, it is the smartest investment you can make.

What are the signs my roof needs restoration?

Look for faded or patchy colour, moss or lichen growth, cracked or slipped tiles, rust spots on metal roofs, peeling paint, light visible through gaps, and rising energy bills. If unsure, we offer a free inspection and assessment.

Can you restore a Colorbond or metal roof?

Yes. Metal roof restoration involves rust treatment, repointing fasteners, and repainting with UV-stable roof paint matched to your existing Colorbond colour.

Do you provide free quotes?

Always. Free on-site inspections and detailed written quotes with no obligation. If you decide to proceed, great. If not, no pressure.

What areas of Melbourne do you serve?

We cover the entire Melbourne metro area including Thomastown, Epping, Mill Park, South Morang, Moonee Ponds, Essendon, Greensborough, Coburg, Reservoir, Preston, Box Hill, and all surrounding suburbs.

Ready to restore your roof?

Contact us for a free, no-obligation quote. We will inspect your roof and provide a detailed breakdown with no surprises.
